info.title: KE8YGW Logger API v1
info.description: Stable /api/v1 contract for hosted and self-hosted deployments. JSON syntax is used so the file is valid YAML and directly parseable in CI.

syncTokenBody.name: X-Compatibility-Body-Sync-Token
syncTokenBody.description: Documentation marker for request-body auth.sync_token compatibility.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, inactive, or revoked credentials.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated caller lacks access; resource existence is not disclosed beyond this contract.

NotFound.description: Route or accessible resource not found.

request_id.description: Echoes X-Request-ID when supplied; otherwise generated by the server.
